summary: Live PR inventory shard reviewed using the hydrated preflight artifact. There is no shared canonical for this shard. All ten seed PRs are open but not merge-ready; close, merge, fix, and raise-PR paths are disabled for this job, so useful or unresolved PRs are kept open or routed to exact maintainer decisions. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined with scoped route_security actions.
